description: Universal Search Query Bar - RAG AI Search + Snippet Highlighting + Search History. Builds the user-facing universal search orchestrator that ties NL query enhancement, hybrid search pipeline, RAG-based AI answer synthesis, snippet generation with highlighting, and search history (private/incognito) into a single unified API.
steps: 1. Create `packages/search/src/services/snippet-highlighter.ts` - a service that takes raw document text + query terms and produces highlighted snippets with configurable context window size. Use <mark> tags for highlighting. Include logic to find the best snippet window around matched terms.

2. Create `packages/search/src/services/snippet-highlighter.test.ts` - test cases: basic term highlighting, multi-term highlighting, snippet window selection, edge cases (empty text, no matches, overlapping terms).

3. Create `packages/search/src/services/rag-answer-synthesizer.ts` - a service that takes top-N search results + original query, formats them as numbered context passages, and calls the AI engine to produce a synthesized answer with citations (referencing result IDs). Interface: `synthesize(query: string, results: RagContext[]): Promise<RagAnswer>` where RagAnswer includes `answer: string`, `citations: Citation[]` (each citation has resultId, excerpt, confidence). Uses a structured prompt that instructs the LLM to only cite claims actually present in the provided context.

4. Create `packages/search/src/services/rag-answer-synthesizer.test.ts` - test with mock AI engine: verifies prompt includes context passages, verifies citation extraction, verifies empty results returns no answer, verifies the synthesizer rejects hallucinated citations not in context.

5. Create `packages/search/src/services/search-history.ts` - a service for managing per-user search history. Methods: `addQuery(userId, query, incognito?)`, `getHistory(userId, limit?)`, `clearHistory(userId)`, `deleteQuery(userId, queryId)`. Incognito queries are never stored. Include `isIncognito` mode toggle per session. In-memory store v1 pattern (Map-based) following SavedSearchService pattern.
6. Create `packages/search/src/services/search-history.test.ts` - tests for add, get, clear, delete, incognito mode, max history cap (100 entries), deduplication.

7. Create `packages/search/src/services/universal-search.ts` - the main orchestrator service. Constructor takes: HybridSearchPipeline, NLQueryEnhancer, PermissionFilter, SnippetHighlighter, RagAnswerSynthesizer, SearchHistory, SavedSearchService, SearchObservabilityService. Method `search(request: UniversalSearchRequest): Promise<UniversalSearchResponse>`. The request includes: query, userId, permissions, options (aiMode boolean, scopes, limit, page, incognito). Flow: (a) record in history unless incognito, (b) enhance query via NLQueryEnhancer, (c) run HybridSearchPipeline across requested scopes, (d) apply permission filter, (e) generate highlighted snippets, (f) if aiMode, run RAG synthesizer on top-20, (g) record metrics in observability, (h) return unified response.

8. Create `packages/search/src/services/universal-search.test.ts` - integration-style tests with all mocked dependencies: verifies full flow, verifies permission filtering blocks unauthorized, verifies AI mode calls synthesizer, verifies incognito skips history, verifies observability recording.
9. Update `packages/search/src/index.ts` barrel exports to include SnippetHighlighter, RagAnswerSynthesizer, SearchHistory, UniversalSearchService and all their types.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm typecheck --filter @quant/search passes with zero errors
pnpm test --filter @quant/search passes with all new tests green
UniversalSearchService orchestrates the full pipeline: NL enhancement -> hybrid search -> permission filter -> snippet highlight -> optional RAG -> history + observability
RAG synthesizer produces citations referencing actual result IDs from context
Search history respects incognito mode and caps at 100 entries
Snippet highlighter marks query terms with <mark> tags
findings: All 268 tests pass (54 new tests across 4 test files). Typecheck clean. ExplanationResult type requires itemId + topSignals (not signals + finalScore). AIEngine.infer requires app as QuantApp type - used type assertion.
